$comment: READ-ONLY MIRROR — DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY. Source of truth: ../opifex/contracts/capability_token.schema.json
title: CapabilityToken
description: Short-lived capability token. Issued by nervus at dispatch time, consumed by tela to bind a connection to a capability profile.

profile_id.description: Identifier of the tela capability profile this token grants access to.

persona_ref.description: Reference to the PersonaSpec for the dispatched run.

instance_id.description: Agent instance this token is bound to. One token per instance.

max_depth.description: Maximum sub-agent depth this token permits

expires_at.description: Token expiration time. tela rejects expired tokens.

token_version.description: Schema version. Consumers must reject unknown versions.

signature.description: Cryptographic signature used to validate token authenticity and integrity.
